result.reason: The issue likely concerns a bug in the handling, storage, or utilization of the Remote Desktop Gateway password during connection establishment or configuration management.
result.approach: Investigate the lifecycle of the RDGatewayPassword, from UI input and storage/retrieval in configuration (XML/SQL) to its final application in the RDP connection protocol, and develop unit tests to validate the fix.
